alert.label: Security Blocker
alert.text: jwt-only-auth.ts grants role:'admin' + permissions:['*'] to every user. All RBAC bypassed. Blocks Scale Test.
alert.escalation: If not resolved by Mar 28, escalate to VP Engineering

tickets.summary: Crawl Intelligence POC — 4-Phase Autonomous Extraction Loop
Crawl Intelligence V1 — URL Analysis with LLM-Powered Extraction
Crawl Intelligence V2–V5 — KB Bridge, Handler Persistence, Multi-Page Crawl, UI
Crawl Intelligence V6–V8 — Algorithm Suite, Worker Wiring & UI
Browse SDK Sprint 2 — ClickHouse Facets, AttributeRegistry & Enrichment Pipeline
Sprint 7 Admin Review UX & Sprint 8 Bug Fixes
KB UX Enhancements — Navigation Redesign, Gap Analysis & Waves 4–6
SearchAI Content Pipeline — CSV Parsing, Field Mapping & FieldsTab UX
Crawler Reliability & Pipeline Unblock — 4 Critical Fixes
Studio UX — i18n Extraction, E2E Testing, Tenant Isolation & Enterprise Connectors

checkpoints.name: PM Demo
checkpoints.riskNote: 2 days away, 29% complete. 5 items WIP, 0 not started. All hands active but none have E2E validation yet.

items.title: Deploy SearchAI to dev
items.detail: Dockerfiles + CI + ArgoCD exist (85%). Missing .env.example. Jira: In Progress.
items.doneWhen: SearchAI pods healthy on dev cluster, .env.example committed, CI green
items.nextAction: Create .env.example files and trigger first deployment to dev

items.title: Document upload → search roundtrip
items.detail: 7-stage pipeline implemented. Jira: In Progress. Mounika working on E2E tests.
items.doneWhen: Upload a PDF via API, verify it appears in search results within 60s
achieved: E2E test file scaffolded, removing it.skip
items.nextAction: Write first passing E2E: POST /upload → GET /search → verify result

items.title: Web crawler → search roundtrip
items.detail: Crawler backend functional (473 tests). Jira: In Progress. E2E roundtrip work started.
items.doneWhen: Submit URL via API, crawler completes, content searchable
items.nextAction: Submit seed URL via API, verify crawled content appears in search

items.title: Agent asks KB and gets answers
items.detail: KB tool executor works. Tests exist but all mock auth. Jira: In Progress.
items.doneWhen: Agent with KB tool returns grounded answer with citations
items.nextAction: Replace mocked auth with real JWT middleware in integration tests

items.title: Browse SDK: taxonomy + facets
items.detail: 4 routes against ClickHouse. BrowsePreviewPage wired. Jira: Done.
items.doneWhen: Taxonomy tree renders, facet drill-down returns documents

items.title: SharePoint connector setup + monitoring
items.detail: Setup done (Wave 1+2). Sync progress done. KPIs partial. Error states + security tab: not started.
items.doneWhen: Admin can connect SharePoint, see sync progress, KPIs populated
items.nextAction: Implement error states panel and security tab

items.title: Canonical fields + vocabulary auto-generated
items.detail: Rule-based 70% + LLM 30%. Auto-apply ≥0.8 confidence. Jira: Done.
items.doneWhen: Upload triggers schema discovery → field mapping → vocabulary generation

checkpoints.name: Scale Test
checkpoints.riskNote: Blocked by ABLP-107 (JWT auth). Cascades: if Scale Test slips, Customer Dry Run and Production both slip.

items.title: Fix JWT auth — every user gets admin
items.detail: jwt-only-auth.ts:125-126 hardcodes role:'admin', permissions:['*']. Jira: To Do, High priority.
items.doneWhen: JWT resolves real roles from token claims. RBAC tests pass.
items.nextAction: Implement proper role/permission resolution from JWT claims

items.title: Scaling review: Redis, ClickHouse, MongoDB, concurrency
items.detail: Single Jira story covering 4 areas. Redis maxmemory: not set. ClickHouse: some tables missing TTLs. MongoDB: no explain() audit. Concurrency: base=5, no load-test. Jira: To Do.
items.doneWhen: Redis maxmemory configured, all ClickHouse TTLs set, top-20 query explain() audit done, load test report exists
items.nextAction: Set Redis maxmemory + eviction policy in docker-compose and Helm

items.title: Content storage compression — reduce MongoDB costs
items.detail: Code validation: extracted content stored uncompressed across 3 redundant MongoDB collections. Same text in 4 places. DocumentPages never cleaned after chunking. 15 SP across 5 phases. At BassPro scale (7M pages): tens of GBs wasted.
items.doneWhen: DocumentPage.text + SearchChunk.content compressed (gz: prefix), HTML gzipped before S3, processed pages have TTL. 60-80% storage reduction measured.
achieved: Existing gz: prefix pattern proven in eval-compression.ts and redis-session-store.ts
items.nextAction: Create shared content-compression utility in packages/search-ai-internal/, apply to DocumentPage writes first

subItems.label: Phase 4: Gzip HTML before S3 (2 SP)
Phase 5: TTL for processed DocumentPages (3 SP)

items.title: Code cleanup: console.logs + empty catches
items.detail: Single Jira story. ~80 console.log and ~40 empty catch handlers across search-ai. Jira: To Do.
items.doneWhen: Zero console.log in server code. Zero empty catch blocks.
items.nextAction: Search-replace console.log in workers/index.ts (15 instances, highest count)

items.title: Monitoring + observability setup
items.detail: No health check endpoints, no structured logging dashboards, no alerting for SearchAI services.
items.doneWhen: Health endpoints on all services, Coroot/Grafana dashboards, basic alerting rules
items.nextAction: Create Jira ticket, add health check endpoints to search-ai and search-ai-runtime

checkpoints.name: Customer Dry Run
checkpoints.riskNote: 8 E2E test suites + 2 new validation items (ABLP-108 webcrawler parity + benchmarks). Code validation found: sitemap parser can't handle 7M URLs (OOM), CSV caps at 100MB (not streaming), no MRR/NDCG metrics exist. Pre-work needed before dry run.

items.nextAction: Fix CI skip, first E2E: ingest → taxonomy → facet query

items.title: E2E: SharePoint connector
items.detail: Jira: In Progress (Bharat). 10 it.skip. Working on Graph API test setup.
items.doneWhen: Min 5 E2E scenarios: OAuth → sync → delta → permissions.
items.nextAction: Set up Graph API test tenant, enable first test block

items.title: WebCrawler feature parity at customer scale
items.detail: Code validation gaps: (1) Sitemap parser uses cheerio.load() — will OOM on 7M URLs, needs streaming XML parser. API hard-caps at 100 pages. (2) CSV ingestion loads entire file in memory (multer + papaparse), 100MB cap, buffer through Redis. (3) SimHash dedup WORKS (template fingerprinting + SHA-256 content dedup). (4) Debug/transparency infrastructure exists but NOT wired to crawl worker.
items.doneWhen: All 4 WebCrawler features verified at BassPro scale (7M URLs). Streaming sitemap parser, raised API caps, streaming CSV parse implemented.
items.nextAction: P0: Replace cheerio sitemap parser with streaming XML (sax/xml-stream), raise maxPages caps

subItems.label: Verify SimHash + SHA-256 dedup at scale
Test debug output with real crawl sessions

items.title: Customer benchmarks — coverage, quality, latency
items.detail: Code validation: SharePoint connector COMPLETE (delta sync, ACLs, token refresh). WebCrawler COMPLETE (multi-page, depth, filters). GAP: No MRR/NDCG metrics exist anywhere in codebase — need eval framework or redefine quality as extraction accuracy + human spot-check. Throughput tracking exists (real-time SyncProgressPublisher + k6 benchmarks).
items.doneWhen: Benchmarks run for 3+ customers (NBB, BassPro, Tennessee, T-Systems, Mizuho). Coverage >95%, quality improvement documented, latency p50/p95/p99 baselined.
achieved: SharePoint delta sync + ACLs + token refresh complete
items.nextAction: Decide: build MRR/NDCG eval framework OR use extraction quality + human relevance spot-check. Then run NBB benchmark first.

items.title: WebCrawler pre-work blockers for dry run
items.detail: These must be fixed BEFORE customer dry run can succeed. P0: streaming sitemap parser + raise page caps. P1: streaming CSV + wire TransparencyService. P2: search quality eval framework.
items.doneWhen: Sitemap handles 7M URLs without OOM. CSV handles >100MB streaming. Crawl debug toggle works.
items.nextAction: Start with streaming sitemap parser — highest risk, blocks BassPro benchmark
